name: cloudiqus-aws-funding
description: AWS funding — MAP, POC credits, WAFR credits, MDF, Activate, BOX feasibility. Funding checked before every SOW.

skills.name: aws-activate
skills.description: AWS Activate programme for startup customers. Up to $100K in AWS credits. CloudiQS registers as Activate Provider. Best for VC-backed startup customers.

skills.name: box-feasibility
skills.description: AWS BOX (Business Continuity on AWS) feasibility study framework. Managed disaster recovery service on Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP. Pilot opportunity identification.

skills.name: funding-stack
skills.description: Full AWS funding matrix for CloudiQS. MAP, POC, WAFR credits, MDF, Activate, BOX. Stacking rules, eligibility criteria, and immediate actions. Run before every SOW.

skills.name: map-eligibility
skills.description: MAP (Migration Acceleration Program) eligibility check and ACE registration checklist. ACE must be registered as type=Migration before any billable work begins.

skills.name: mdf-brief
skills.description: MDF (Market Development Funds) activity brief template for pre-approval. Covers eligible activities, co-funding rules, claim deadline, and required documentation.

skills.name: poc-approval
skills.description: POC (Proof of Concept) credit approval process for GenAI and innovative AWS workloads. PDM written approval required before SOW is sent. Up to $25K or 10% of project value.

skills.name: wafr-credits
skills.description: WAFR credit claim process. 5-business-day Partner Portal submission window — non-negotiable. Credit values, submission checklist, required documents.

commands.name: map-check
commands.description: MAP eligibility check and ACE registration checklist. Register before work starts — missed funding is permanent.

commands.name: mdf-brief
commands.description: Draft an MDF activity brief for PDM pre-approval. Required before committing any spend.

commands.name: poc-approval
commands.description: Prepare and send the POC credit approval request to PDM. Must be done before SOW is sent.

commands.name: stack
commands.description: Calculate the full AWS funding stack for an opportunity. Returns applicable programmes, total value, actions, stacking strategy, net customer cost.

commands.name: wafr-credits
commands.description: WAFR credit claim checklist for Partner Portal submission. 5-business-day window — first line of output must state the deadline.
